author: Scott Cui
name: Legal TTT + Muon+ + QK Gain 4.0
blurb: In-progress non-record submission generated with arc/autoresearch from the ValCalib GPTQ + XSA-all base. Adds Muon+ row-wise update normalization, higher QK gain init (4.0), and legal score-first TTT. Single-seed exact result: 1.11314283 BPB / 1.87949504 nats, but current artifact is 17,347,791 bytes so the run is over the 16MB limit and not yet submittable as a record entry.
